title: CozyCave & Rudelcord Community
description: Mostly normal Minecraft with a lot of decorations and food, but also a bit of technology.
body:
**CozyCave** is a carefully curated modpack that offers a cozy, immersive, and creative experience. It combines the beauty of decorative design with new culinary possibilities and exciting adventures in an expanded world.  

With **Farmer's Delight**, **Croptopia**, and **Japan Delight**, you can enhance your kitchen with delicious dishes, while **YUNG's Better Structures** and **Biomes O' Plenty** bring breathtaking biomes and structures to the game. Decoration enthusiasts will love **Decorative Blocks**, **Macaw's Furniture**, and **Fantasy's Furniture** for personalizing their surroundings.  

New adventures await in unique dungeons, mineshafts, and revamped structures with **Dungeons and Taverns** and **YUNG's Better Dungeons**. For tech enthusiasts, **Create**, **Mekanism**, and **Refined Storage** offer machines, systems, and automation opportunities.  

Whether you’re cooking, building, exploring, or diving into technical creativity, CozyCave provides a perfectly balanced experience full of comfort and inspiration.

The modpack was designed for the community server by [MσησYυкιнуō](https://www.twitch.tv/monoyukihyo) and [WoweePaw](https://www.twitch.tv/woweepaw), but open to everyone.
